dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Would you like some tea, as well?

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: It's been a while since you were in charge of the grade school kids.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: How are the kids this year?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I must say, they show promise.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: I heard you had to give one of them a Tonitrus Bolt on their first day.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: True, it was a rather rare occurrence for our prestigious Eden College.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: It's the first time I've heard of it happening, too.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: I only did what was necessary.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: and misconduct will be met with punishment.

dialogue.name: Instructor
dialogue.speech: I have much to learn from you, sir.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: As the elementary students pass through the gates of Eden College

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: to learn true elegance every day, our school's traditions shall live on.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Our house of learning exists to ensure the future of our country is elegant.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Isn't this your older brother, Lord Damian?

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: This must be his entrance ceremony!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: He's probably elsewhere in this book, too!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: And here! He's truly an MVP!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Your brother is just raking in the Stellas! How magnificent!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: But I'm sure you'll become an Imperial Scholar even faster, Lord Damian!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: We all know you'll be the first to get a Stella in our grade!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: But we still have a while until our exams.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: We'll be having a dodgeball tournament with the other classes!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: My friend told me something he heard from his friend in Class .

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: He said if you become MVP, you can get a Stella!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: This is your chance, Lord Damian!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: It is a clear, sunny day.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Young ladies and gentlemen of Eden,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: you will be adding another page to Eden's history today...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Shut up! You picked a fight with me first!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You're not supposed to talk to girls like that!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, I have acquired important news!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You may be able to get a Stella at your next P.E. class?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: My friend told me something she heard from her friend in Class .

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: The MVP from the winning class in next week's tournament

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: So it's a rumor? That seems dubious.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Then we need to train, Miss Anya!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So what sport will you be playing?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That's the game where you hit your opponent with a ball to do them in, right?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama! Teach me a k*ller move!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Very well! I shall teach you the ultimate k*ller move with a ball.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I just used to play catch with my brother sometimes.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I can't tell them I rip people apart and toss them around on a daily basis!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Just leave this to me, Miss Anya!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'll show you a k*ller move that will help you catch that star!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I will reach for the stars in dodgeball!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm glad she's so motivated... but...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Super Anya will catch the star!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You're not just using your arms when you throw the ball.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: You need to make sure you step out with your foot,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: twist your hips as you shift your weight,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: channel all of your strength into your shoulder, and... throw!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Okay! Now you give it a try!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I don't really understand how, but I did decide to let Yor handle this.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna catch that star tomorrow!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I did my best. I survived Mama's ruthless training.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I even thought up a name for my k*ller shot.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna get lots of stars...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: so I can help Papa with his mission!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: At least it's clear that you're motivated.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Just make sure you don't hold Lord Damian back, Stubby Legs.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Why are we playing together with the boys?

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Being on the same team with him is the worst.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Second son... The son of Papa's target for this mission.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Good things happen if I become friends with him.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: But he gets really mean, so I don't like him.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Well, I don't have any time to waste on a runt like you, either.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I'm going to get MVP in this tournament and be rewarded a Stella.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I need to become an Imperial Scholar just like my brother.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Your usual P.E. teacher, Bobby, is out sick, so I will be his substitute.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Do not forget to be proper young men and ladies,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: and execute the most elegant of plays.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: We will now begin the dodgeball tournament between Class , Cecile Hall,

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Let's show them who's boss, Lord Damian.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: We gathered some intel on Class !

dialogue.name: flashback Damian
dialogue.speech: In order to be awarded a Stella, you have to become the MVP.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: In order to defeat Class and win this match, first...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: The son of a command major, Bill Watkins.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What the heck is that monster?!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: There's no way he's our age!

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Because of his obviously blessed physique and brains,

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: he won awards in all kinds of sports tournaments in kindergarten.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Are there even that many tournaments in kindergarten?!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Wearing glasses right now is dangerous, old man.

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: I humbly thank you for your concern, Damian, son of Chairman Desmond.

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: But I'll be fine, because that ball won't be hitting me.

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: Any hits above the shoulders don't count.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Don't panic! That was just a fluke!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: Every imaginable detail has been calculated.

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: We're not just talking simulations. I've trained my body to its limit.

dialogue.name: Bill's Father
dialogue.speech: You will eventually be the hero of Eden, as well as our army.

dialogue.name: Bill's Father
dialogue.speech: Make sure you seize those Stellas with your own hands.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Um, hello?! We'll die if that actually hits us!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: Don't worry. I'll hold back on you women.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Actually, that also pisses me off.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That's some mouth you've got on you.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Do you really think we went into this without a plan, you giant oaf?

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: You're gonna be the MVP! I just know it!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: Now, this is what you call...

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: It was an honor to fight by your side.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: I know all kinds of great things about you, Lord Damian.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: Though I can't remember a single one right now, I'm sure there was something.

dialogue.name: Emile
dialogue.speech: a true MVP in our hearts!

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Once we give up, it's game over—

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Damn it! At this rate, we're gonna lose.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I need to find his weakness!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I don't care if the others go down.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I need to somehow survive and stand out!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Second son is a real shithead.

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: we have that little runt over there.

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: I'm going to aim for... her feet!

dialogue.name: Out of Bounds Class Student A
Bill
dialogue.speech: jumped before I threw the ball!

dialogue.name: Out of bounds class student B
Bill
dialogue.speech: I'll aim for her right arm!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: I guess I'll just have to use my secret weapon!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: This throw will suddenly change its course and nail any opponent scampering about!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What was that about holding back on women?!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: That's impossible! She's reading my every attack!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: Who in the world is that girl?!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: meaning to swiftly move out of the way.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Anya! Look out for the guys out of bounds!

dialogue.name: Bill
dialogue.speech: You were impressive, but even you can't dodge from that position!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: The b*stard just threw that ball with everything he has!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: It's unfortunate... But in the end, this is her own fault.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Don't worry. I shall survive and lead Class to victory.

dialogue.name: Ewen
dialogue.speech: Wh-What are you doing, Lord Damian?!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: Oh, no! My chance at MVP!

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: I was just frustrated that he was taking out our team left and right,

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: so I tried to catch it...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: You're the only one left. It's in your hands now.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The future is in Anya's hands.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Now is the time to unleash my k*ller shot!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Miss Anya, this is my final lesson for you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: The key to throwing a ball well is to put your whole body into the throw.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Think of this ball as an arrow of light!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I won't let your death go to waste, second son.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: That power she had when she knocked me out...

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: She might just be able to...

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: I have no idea what's going on, but this is intense.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The most important thing is shifting my weight.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: The power in my stepand the twisting of my hips

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: need to go to my widdle hands...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: And then my widdle hands... um... um...

dialogue.name: Class students
dialogue.speech: Now you're definitely getting that Stella, Bill!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: There are no Stella awarded for winning a mere mini-game in a single class.

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Who in the world suggested otherwise?

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: On the other hand, you had the nerve to yell something as vile as "die" during the match,

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: so I have no issue with giving you a Tonitrus Bolt instead.

dialogue.name: Class students
dialogue.speech: Don't worry, Bill! We'll just try harder next time!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: Two students who were at odds with each other worked together to take on this challenge.

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: Too bad, Anya. But you did great!

dialogue.name: Henderson
dialogue.speech: This shows that you are worthy of a Stella, young ladies and gentlemen.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: You can't be serious, you moron! What was that crappy throw?!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: What's your problem? It's not like you hit anyone!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Anya doesn't like you after all.

dialogue.name: Damian
dialogue.speech: What did you say, Stubby Legs?!

dialogue.name: Becky
dialogue.speech: You're not supposed to say stuff like that to girls!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Everything Mama teaches me is useless.
